name: Name
change: You can change the language in Settings Page after Logging in
not_found: An account was not found with the provided email. Click the sign up link below.
error: An error occurred when logging in.
emulator_mode_banner: Local Firebase emulators are on. Use the emulator test accounts from the README — not production passwords. For production sign-in, stop this server and run npm run dev:live.
login_network_emulator: Cannot reach the Auth emulator (port 9099). Wait until npm run dev shows the emulator is ready, or use npm run dev:live for production Firebase.
login_network_live: Could not reach Firebase (network). Check your connection, VPN, and App Check / debug token setup.
contact: I agree that my local newsroom can contact me to follow-up on the reports I share
